channel.title: Delta V IntelHub — All Signals
channel.description: Curated intelligence feed from Delta V

item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.title: A Solana OG had 181K $SOL($14.2M) stolen. The thief sold all 181K $SOL, bridged the funds to #Ethereum, and swapped them for 7,918 $ETH($14.2M). According to @zachxbt. https://arkm.com/explorer/addres

item.description: pKREMLIN:br /br /ON ONE SIDE, THERE IS RUSSIA. ON THE OTHER SIDE, THERE IS UKRAINE, TOGETHER WITH A NUMBER OF EUROPEAN COUNTRIES AND THE UNITED STATES, SUPPLYING UKRAINE WITH MILLIONS OF TONS OF WEAPONS.br /br /IT IS NO LONGER AN OPERATION. IT IS A FULL-SCALE WAR. .../p

item.title: KREMLIN: IS THERE, FOR EUROPEANS, ON EUROPEAN SOIL, ANY GREATER EVIL THAN RUSSIA? NO. SO THIS IS A BRAINWASHING OF EUROPEAN TAXPAYERS. THEY ARE BEING 100% BRAINWASHED. WE ARE PORTRAYED AS ABSOLUTE EVI

THEY ARE BEING 100% BRAINWASHED.br /br /WE ARE PORTRAYED AS ABSOLUTE EVIL.br /br /THE THEORY THAT THEY ARE ALL IN DANGER IS BEING PUSHED RELENTLESSLY.

item.title: Great comment from a subscriber who commented in our Chat on his direct experience. Agentic AI is pretty difficult to implement at scale in production because (1) a bunch of new types of systems need
item.description: pGreat comment from a subscriber who commented in our Chat on his direct experience. br /br /Agentic AI is pretty difficult to implement at scale in production because (1) a bunch of new types of systems need to be built that have never existed before (orchestration /routing, context engineering, st

item.title: This is true as I have heard this from contacts in the Valley. Goes with my pinned post. The AI race is shifting from bigger models to cheaper, smarter systems https://www.cnbc.com/2026/07/10/the-ai-r

item.title: Measuring Is Not Enough Anymore
item.description: pspanIs measuring general AI capabilities a good strategy to reduce AI existential risk, compared to other strategies? A disclaimer upfront: To answer that, one organization in particular will serve as an example, but the argument that we'll be making applies just as much or little across all of AI
